---
title: "Marguérite De Witt"
---

## Marguérite De Witt

**Dates:** (1853-1924)

### Description

elder daughter of Henriette (Guizot) de Witt

### Biography

[<i>Lettres à sa fille Henriette</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 12th 1885 
- Letter from August 11. [1869]
- Letter from August 10. [1869]
- Letter from August 9. [1869]
- Letter from August 6. [1869]
- Letter from August 5 [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
